title: Social Media & Business Listing Scraper
description: Configure which platforms to scrape, provide target URLs, and set proxy/concurrency options.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: List of platform identifiers to enable for this run.

urls.title: Target URLs
urls.description: Array of objects specifying the platform and URL to scrape.

platform.description: Platform identifier matching one of the enabled platforms.

proxyUrls.title: Third-Party Proxy URLs
proxyUrls.description: Optional list of third-party proxy URLs. Used when useApifyProxy is false.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max Request Retries
maxRequestRetries.description: How many times to retry a failed request.

linkedinDailyLimit.title: LinkedIn Daily Limit
linkedinDailyLimit.description: Maximum LinkedIn profiles to scrape per day (G-BOT-01 hard cap: 250).

googleMapsGrid.title: Google Maps Grid
googleMapsGrid.description: Geographic grid configuration for Google Maps scraping.
